title: December 4
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 4''' is the 338th (339th in leap years) day of the year. There are 27 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Fred Armisen]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Frederik Budolph-Larsen]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Annual (1977) 1|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 1]] published.
*[[1995]] – ''[[The Crystal Star]]'' paperback released.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Insider 57|''Star Wars Insider'' 57]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 49]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Aliens in the Empire]]'' Part 2 online supplement published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Transfer]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2009]] – "[[Brain Invaders]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2010]] - ''[[Star Wars: Imperial Academy]]'' released.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars: Poe Dameron Vol. 5 — The Spark and the Fire]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Jedi Fallen Order - Dark Temple 5|''Jedi Fallen Order - Dark Temple'' 5]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Saga 1|''Star Wars Saga'' 1]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Chapter 14: The Tragedy]]" premiered on [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – [[Battle of Jakku — Republic Under Siege 3|''Battle of Jakku — Republic Under Siege'' 3]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Cary-Hiroyuki Tagawa]] dies.
<noinclude>
